[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110001000 3
1 0001111101 6
2 1111111011 9
3 1111011010 7
4 1111001000 5
5 1011111101 8
6 1001100111 6
7 1111111101 9

12 21 1111011010 7 match 3

67 76 0111111111 9
70 07 1111011111 9

13 31 1111011111 9
24 42 1111000100 5
35 53 1111111101 9 match 7
46 64 1111110111 9

60 06 1111111111 a
71 17 0101011111 7
